TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking G1 Scouting the Residential Lots in the World of 1983.
changeReason: "Preview of Lots for Sale" changed to "Scouting the Residential Lots" — different action (previewing vs scouting) and different description of the lots (for sale vs residential), altering the implied purpose and nature of the location.

TextENGNew:

changeReason: "Death" changed to "Murder" — 撲殺 specifically means killing by beating, so "murder" accurately reflects the violent, criminal nature of the event rather than the neutral "death."
